sections.paragraph:
m. with suff. צִדֹּו, pl. ־ִים (from the root צָדַד which see).

(1) a side, Deu 31:26 2Sa 2:16, and frequently; specially apparently used of the left side, 1Sa 20:25 Psa 91:7 (opp. to יָמִין). מִצַּד at the side of any thing, Deu 31:26 Jos 12:9 עַל צַד at the side, i.e. on the arms where children are carried, Isa 60:4 66:12 . With ה parag. צִדָּה on the side, 1Sa 20:20.

(2) an adversary, Jud. 2:3 .

צד

Ch. i.q. Heb. No. 1, side. מִצַּד on the side, or part of, Dan 6:5. לְצַד at or against the part of, Vulg. contra, Dan 7:25.
